summary: Iteration 18: Frontend-only testing of UI cleanup changes. All 7 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Tabs have more padding: px-4 lg:px-6 py-2 lg:py-3 text-sm lg:text-base with rounded-lg styling
Quick Capture has 3-column layout: IP Calc (left) | Entry + Tags (center) | Summary (right)
Summary panel shows: 7 Sites (4 DC, 3 Loc), 250K IPs (690K KW), View Sizing, Token Pack
'Select Solution' label with star icon appears next to platform toggle
Site Sizing Recommendations header has NO platform toggle - only title + inline stats + Export
Inline summary stats in Site Sizing header: 7 Sites | 1.6M IPs | 34.3K Tokens | IB-TOKENS-50K
Platform toggle in Quick Capture controls the Sizing table mode - UDDI mode changes platform to NIOS-X Virtual Server
critical_code_review_comments: Tab styling correctly uses: px-4 lg:px-6 py-2 lg:py-3 text-sm lg:text-base with rounded-lg
QuickCaptureBarInline has 3-column flex layout with IP Calc, Entry+Tags, and Summary panels
TokenCalculatorSummary header simplified - no platform toggle, only title + inline stats + Export
Platform toggle in Quick Capture correctly controls platformMode state which affects Sizing table
Inline summary stats show: Sites | IPs | Tokens | Token Pack SKU
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 4 DCs and 3 Locations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI cleanup changes verified: 1) Tabs have more padding (px-4 lg:px-6 py-2 lg:py-3). 2) Quick Capture 3-column layout working. 3) Summary panel on right side. 4) 'Select Solution' label with star icon. 5) Site Sizing header simplified - no platform toggle. 6) Inline summary stats in Site Sizing header. 7) Platform toggle in Quick Capture controls Sizing table mode.

tabs_padding.implementation: px-4 lg:px-6 py-2 lg:py-3 text-sm lg:text-base with rounded-lg

quick_capture_3_column_layout.implementation: Flex layout with IP Calc (left), Entry+Tags (center), Summary (right)
quick_capture_3_column_layout.details: IP Calc: w-[130px] lg:w-[200px], Summary: w-[140px] lg:w-[200px], Center: flex-1

summary_panel.implementation: Shows Sites, IPs, Tokens (placeholder), Token Pack (placeholder)

select_solution_label.implementation: Star icon + 'Select Solution' text next to platform toggle

site_sizing_no_platform_toggle.implementation: Header only shows title + inline stats + Export button
site_sizing_no_platform_toggle.details: Platform toggle removed from TokenCalculatorSummary, now only in Quick Capture

inline_summary_stats.implementation: Shows: Sites | IPs | Tokens | Token Pack SKU

platform_toggle_controls_sizing.implementation: platformMode state from Quick Capture controls Sizing table
platform_toggle_controls_sizing.details: UDDI mode changes platform to NIOS-X Virtual Server, roles to DNS/DHCP
